untranslatable_reason: Signal requires 'Relative strength rank' and 'EPS growth rate positive YoY' which are not available in the allowed indicators list. RSI was used as a proxy for relative strength momentum, but true relative strength ranking (comparing stock performance against peers/index) and fundamental EPS growth metrics cannot be directly translated.
translation_notes: Mapped 'Relative strength rank > 80' to rsi_14 > 80 as technical proxy. Mapped 'Price above 50-day MA' to close > sma_50. Mapped 'Volume above 15-day average' to volume > vol_ratio_20 (best available volume indicator). Exit condition 'RS drops below 60' mapped to rsi_14 < 60. The 25% gain target and 10% stop loss are noted; stop_loss_pct set to 10.0. EPS growth condition cannot be expressed with technical indicators only.
